summary: Independent QA accepts the systemic interaction validation evidence. The first viewport, District 1 troop obligation path, appointment preview/confirm feedback, map/task/inspector synchronization, required screenshots, console-clean evidence, and scope boundaries are sufficiently supported to reopen M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 for product-owner reconsideration. This does not approve formal M7 content lock.

tests_run.result: On codex/m7-systemic-interaction-validation with a clean worktree before writing the QA handoff.
Validation commit added tests/e2e/web-shell.spec.ts, two screenshot evidence PNGs, and manual smoke notes only.
Writer handoff commit added only the test_engineer REVIEW handoff.
Branch diff contains process/task/message files plus tests/e2e/web-shell.spec.ts and the validation screenshots; no product code package changes were present.
No whitespace or patch formatting errors.
Task JSON is valid and remains in REVIEW for qa_reviewer.
Task list shows M7-SYSTEMIC-INTERACTION-VALIDATION-001 in REVIEW and M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 still BLOCKED.
Command exited successfully with no ready-task output in this branch state.
Screenshot dimensions verified: EVIDENCE-1440x900.png is 1440x900 and EVIDENCE-1280x720.png is 1280x720.
Validation commit changed only tests/e2e/web-shell.spec.ts, the two evidence screenshots, and manual smoke notes.
Validation plus writer-handoff scope contains no sim-core, protocol, save-format, content-source, Electron, server, telemetry, manual battle, or final art paths.
Writer handoff commit diff check passed.

decisions.decision: Accepted: screenshots and E2E assertions support first-viewport phase/main task/next action recognition; District 1 troop obligation handling from task and selected district context; appointment before/after, cost, benefit, risk, result feedback, and duplicate-submit guard; and map/task/inspector synchronization.
Accepted: the evidence-capture Playwright test records console error and pageerror events and asserts an empty error list; the writer reported the focused test and full E2E suite passing.
Evidence is sufficient to return M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 to product-owner reconsideration.
This QA acceptance does not approve formal M7 content lock. Product-owner approval remains required, and M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 remains a separate Human Gate.
No sim-core, protocol, save-format, content-source, Electron, server, telemetry, manual node battle, or final art changes were found in the validation and writer-handoff commits.

risks: Formal M7 content lock remains unresolved until the product owner explicitly chooses the Human Gate outcome.

QA did not rerun the focused Playwright screenshot test because it writes to the committed evidence PNG paths; independent review instead checked the test assertions, writer-reported command results, screenshot dimensions, and screenshot contents.
requested_action: Reopen M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 for product-owner reconsideration using this evidence package, without marking formal M7 content lock accepted.
